definitions.subtitle: ={{$parameter["operation"] + ": " + $parameter["resource"]}}
definitions.description: Read, update, write and delete data from NocoDB

options.name: Set Automatically
options.description: Automatically set based on resource and operation

options.name: Set Manually
options.description: Manually set the description

properties.name: toolDescription
properties.default: Read, update, write and delete data from NocoDB
properties.description: Explain to the LLM what this tool does, a good, specific description would allow LLMs to produce expected results much more often

options.name: Create
options.description: Create a new row in a table

options.name: Create or Update
options.description: Create a new record, or update the current one if it already exists (upsert)

options.name: Update
options.description: Update a row in a table

options.name: Delete
options.description: Delete a row from a table

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve a record from a table

options.name: Search
options.description: Search for specific records or list all

options.name: Count
options.description: Count records in a table

options.name: Upload Attachment to Cell
options.description: Upload attachment(s) to an existing cell in a row
options.action: Upload attachment to a row cell

properties.name: workspaceId
properties.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

properties.name: projectId
properties.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

properties.name: table
properties.description: The table to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

options.name: where
options.description: A formula used to filter rows

properties.name: id
properties.description: The value of the ID field

properties.name: downloadAttachments
properties.description: Whether the attachment fields defined in 'Download Fields' will be downloaded

properties.name: downloadFieldNames
properties.description: Names of the fields of type 'attachment' that should be downloaded. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

properties.name: returnAll
properties.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

properties.name: limit
properties.description: Max number of results to return

properties.name: downloadAttachments
properties.description: Whether the attachment fields defined in 'Download Fields' will be downloaded

properties.name: downloadFieldNames
properties.description: Names of the fields of type 'attachment' that should be downloaded. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

options.name: viewId
options.description: The view to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

options.name: fields
options.description: The select fields of the returned rows

options.name: sort
options.description: The sorting rules for the returned rows

values.name: field
values.description: Name of the field to sort on

options.name: ASC
options.description: Sort in ascending order (small -> large)

options.name: DESC
options.description: Sort in descending order (large -> small)

options.name: where
options.description: A formula used to filter rows

options.name: page
options.description: The number of pages to skip from the beginning

options.name: shuffle
options.description: Whether to shuffle the results

properties.name: dataToSend

options.name: Auto-Map Input Data to Columns
options.description: Use when node input properties match destination column names

options.name: Define Below for Each Column
options.description: Set the value for each destination column

properties.description: Whether to insert the input data this node receives in the new row

properties.displayName: In this mode, make sure the incoming data fields are named the same as the columns in NocoDB. (Use an 'Edit Fields' node before this node to change them if required.)
properties.name: info
inputsToIgnore
properties.description: List of input properties to avoid sending, separated by commas. Leave empty to send all properties.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The value of the ID field

properties.name: dataToSend

options.name: Auto-Map Input Data to Columns
options.description: Use when node input properties match destination column names

options.name: Define Below for Each Column
options.description: Set the value for each destination column

properties.description: Whether to insert the input data this node receives in the new row

properties.name: id
properties.description: The value of the ID field

properties.displayName: In this mode, make sure the incoming data fields are named the same as the columns in NocoDB. (Use an 'Edit Fields' node before this node to change them if required.)
properties.name: info
inputsToIgnore
properties.description: List of input properties to avoid sending, separated by commas. Leave empty to send all properties.

properties.name: dataToSend

options.name: Auto-Map Input Data to Columns
options.description: Use when node input properties match destination column names

options.name: Define Below for Each Column
options.description: Set the value for each destination column

properties.description: Whether to insert the input data this node receives in the new row

properties.name: id
properties.description: The value of the ID field. Keep empty for create (insert).

properties.displayName: In this mode, make sure the incoming data fields are named the same as the columns in NocoDB. (Use an 'Edit Fields' node before this node to change them if required.)
properties.name: info
inputsToIgnore
properties.description: List of input properties to avoid sending, separated by commas. Leave empty to send all properties.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The value of the ID field

properties.name: uploadMode
properties.description: Choose a way to perform the upload

properties.name: uploadFieldName
properties.description: Name of the fields of type 'attachment' that will be uploaded. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

properties.name: uploadFieldName
properties.description: Name of the fields of type 'attachment' that will be uploaded. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

properties.name: filename
properties.description: Name of uploaded file

properties.name: contentType
properties.description: Content type of file

properties.name: base64value
properties.description: Base64 value of file that will be upload

properties.name: url
properties.description: URL of file that will be uploaded
